page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m1.large is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 2 physical cores with 2 vCPUs, utilizing a single thread per core configuration. The system is equipped with 2.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 1.0 GB per core ratio. There is no local storage bundled with this instance, and it does not include any GPU hardware. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the lower tiers of compute and memory capabilities. In stress-ng testing, the single-core CPU performance scored 1099.89, while the multi-core performance reached 1457.99, placing it in the bottom 25% and 10% respectively. Memory bandwidth tests show read-only small block cached performance at 81.68 GB/sec, which drops to 9.96 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, and write speeds of 9.32 GB/sec. Passmark CPU and memory scores are 1819.5 and 806.21, reflecting its entry-level hardware profile.

Given the dedicated CPU allocation but highly constrained memory and lack of local storage, this instance represents a low-resource entry point. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for lightweight, non-memory-intensive workloads. It is suitable for basic tasks such as static web serving, where it achieves a throughput of 1.3 GB/sec, or simple database operations and lightweight Redis key-value transactions.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m1.large is an entry-level x86_64 server instance featuring 2 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz and 2.0 GB of RAM. Lacking local storage and GPU accelerators, it relies on a KVM hypervisor and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps. Benchmark results indicate modest performance, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1099.89 and a multi-core score of 1457.99, placing it in the lower performance percentiles. Memory bandwidth is limited, with large-block write speeds at 9.32 GB/sec. This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for highly constrained, lightweight workloads that do not require substantial memory or storage, such as basic static web serving, simple background tasks, or minor database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u0.c1m1.large is an entry-level x86_64 server with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 2.0 GB of RAM, and 1 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for lightweight utility workloads.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core x86_64 utility instance with minimal memory footprint for lightweight background tasks and basic web serving.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 processor with 2 vCPUs and 2.0 GB RAM
No bundled local storage or GPU hardware
1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on KVM hypervisor
Suitable for basic static web serving and lightweight database operations
Qualitatively cost-efficient for low-resource utility workloads
